metadata.description: HarnessFlow — a three-layer skill suite for high-quality AI coding: spec-driven development (SDD), gated test-driven development (TDD), and pluggable ext-* domain extensions.

plugins.name: harness-flow
plugins.description: HarnessFlow v2.0.0: 6 core skills own the main chain specify -> review -> design -> review -> tdd -> review -> ship (hf-workflow entry + state recovery, hf-specify, hf-design, hf-review with three stage checklists, hf-tdd, hf-ship). Domain skills plug in as ext-* extensions loaded per stage (ext-ui-design and ext-cpp ship as seeds). All process state lives in features/<NNN>-<slug>/ artifacts; author/reviewer separation and stage gates are hard rules.
